full_text:
Que Yi 卻揖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Que Yi (卻揖)was born in Henan. Remained in Yi despite murder of father as he felt it was safer then anywhere else. Served Meng Da. Que Yi was affiliated with Liu Zhang, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wei Kingdom. Que Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
